main.description: A subject — the thing a community is collectively responding to in a round (a song to cover, a book to read, a recipe to cook, a theme to draw). Subjects have identity beyond any single round and may be referenced by multiple rounds over time.

title.description: The subject's title (song name, book title, theme name, etc.).

kind.description: What kind of subject this is — e.g. 'song', 'book', 'recipe', 'theme', 'film'. Free-form to allow new community types; clients can specialize on known values.

attribution.description: Original creator or source — artist for a song, author for a book, chef for a recipe. Optional; some subjects (themes, prompts) have no attribution.

externalRef.description: Canonical identifier in an external system (MusicBrainz URI, ISBN URL, IMDB URL, etc.). Useful for cross-community discovery.

createdAt.description: When this subject was added to the catalog.
